properties.Observation: It is a naturally flowing stream. Water is being obtained informally using pipes.
properties.Description: Replanting bamboo species along the stream banks to prevent erosion

properties.Observation: A tank has been built at the site of the spring, but it is currently in a dilapidated condition. About 25 families draw water from it.

properties.Observation: An anicut has been constructed at the source to obtain water for the water project, and a water storage tank has been constructed below. About 40 families draw water from it.
properties.Description:
Replaster the Water Stock Tank (2.5m x2.5m x 2.0m)

Remove the existing plaster layer of the tank

Plaster 12mm thick in 1:3 cement and sand finished smooth with gray cement floating (Inside and the outside of the tank)
Tidying up
